band_overlap_count: At how many x-axis labels do the shaded bands for "{series_a_label}" and "{series_b_label}" overlap?
Count the visible x-axis positions where the shaded band for "{series_a_label}" overlaps the shaded band for "{series_b_label}".
For how many labeled x positions do the two shaded uncertainty bands overlap?
Using the upper and lower band boundaries, how many x-axis labels have overlap between "{series_a_label}" and "{series_b_label}"?
How many labeled x positions show the two shaded bands sharing some vertical range?
widest_band_x_label: For series "{target_series_label}", which x-axis label has the {rank_phrase} shaded band, measured as upper bound minus lower bound?
Look only at series "{target_series_label}". What x-axis label has the {rank_phrase} uncertainty band?
Using band width from lower boundary to upper boundary, which x-axis label is {rank_phrase} for "{target_series_label}"?
Find the x-axis label where series "{target_series_label}" has its {rank_phrase} shaded range.
For "{target_series_label}", what visible x-axis label corresponds to the {rank_phrase} band width?
narrowest_band_x_label: For series "{target_series_label}", which x-axis label has the {rank_phrase} shaded band, measured as upper bound minus lower bound?
